name: loop-architect
description: Audit a workspace's AI integrations, map them onto an optimization staircase, diagnose gaps, and scaffold self-improving evaluation/optimization loops (Levels 1-3) so developers move off ad-hoc prompt tweaking and onto metric-driven compilation.

inspired_by.name: DSPy: Compiling Declarative Language Model Calls into Self-Improving Pipelines
inspired_by.author: Omar Khattab
inspired_by.contribution: Declarative LM framework: typed Signatures, Modules, and Optimizers (BootstrapFewShot, MIPROv2). Reframes prompt engineering as program design and gives Level 2 (Subroutine Compilation) its compilation target.

inspired_by.name: DSPy: The End of Prompt Engineering
inspired_by.author: Kevin Madura
inspired_by.contribution: Practical framing of declarative LM compilation as cognitive-subroutine engineering inside production AI workspaces. Anchors the skill's Level 2 scaffold recommendation.

inspired_by.name: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
inspired_by.author: Noah Shinn
inspired_by.contribution: Iteration caps, structured failure critique, and reflective self-improvement loops. Underwrites Level 1 (System-Prompt Learning) and the iteration-cap guardrails in Level 3.
